name: Row count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_trades FROM paimon.workshop.trades

name: Notional by ticker
sql:
SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) AS trades, SUM(quantity * price) AS notional
FROM paimon.workshop.trades
GROUP BY ticker
ORDER BY notional DESC

name: Average price by side
sql:
SELECT side, COUNT(*) AS trades, AVG(price) AS avg_price
FROM paimon.workshop.trades
GROUP BY side

name: Per-minute volume (tumbling window, batch)
sql:
SELECT
  TUMBLE_START(trade_time, INTERVAL '1' MINUTE) AS window_start,
  COUNT(*) AS trades,
  SUM(quantity) AS shares
FROM paimon.workshop.trades
GROUP BY TUMBLE(trade_time, INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)
ORDER BY window_start

name: Top 10 accounts by activity
sql:
SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS trades, SUM(quantity * price) AS notional
FROM paimon.workshop.trades
GROUP BY account_id
ORDER BY trades DESC
LIMIT 10

name: Paimon snapshots (system table)
sql:
SELECT snapshot_id, schema_id, commit_kind, commit_time, total_record_count
FROM paimon.workshop.`trades$snapshots`
ORDER BY snapshot_id DESC
